rawContext:
## Sequence diagram example
Canonical example from the official Mermaid docs.
mermaidCode:
sequenceDiagram Alice->>John: Hello John, how are you? loop Healthcheck John->>John: Fight against hypochondria end Note right of John: Rational thoughts
prevail! John-->>Alice: Great! John->>Bob: How about you? Bob-->>John: Jolly good!

rawContext:
## State diagram example
Canonical example showing nested states and forks.
mermaidCode:
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Still
    Still --> [*]
    Still --> Moving
    Moving --> Still
    Moving --> Crash
    Crash --> [*]
    state Moving {
        [*] --> Accelerating
        Accelerating --> Cruising
        Cruising --> Decelerating
        Decelerating --> [*]
    }

rawContext:
## Gantt example
Project schedule for a software release.
mermaidCode:
gantt
    title Release Plan
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    section Design
    Spec       :done,    a1, 2026-01-01, 14d
    Review     :active,  a2, after a1, 7d
    section Build
    Feature A  :         b1, after a2, 21d
    Feature B  :         b2, after b1, 14d
    section Release
    Beta       :         c1, after b2, 7d
    GA         :crit,    c2, after c1, 3d
